title: Platanthera orbicularis
taxonomy: Platanthera orbicularis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae, specifically within the tribe Orchideae. Further, P. orbicularis is placed in the genus Platanthera, which comprises terrestrial orchids commonly known as bog orchids. The genus Platanthera is characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and is native to North America. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics.

intro: Platanthera orbicularis, also known as Round-leaved Orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain, and support immune function.
